{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Nafir Nuren
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Nafir Nuren]] is the leader of the [[Nuren]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Nafir Nuren]] is at least sixty years old.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
